ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "bust_size" TEXT /* Bust size of the user */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the user */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the user (e.g., hourglass, athletic) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the user */,
  "preferred_sizes" TEXT /* Preferred sizes for quick selection */,
  "preferred_occasions" TEXT /* Preferred occasions for personalized recommendations */,
  "subscription_status" INTEGER /* Subscription status (true/false) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for rewards */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_body_type FOREIGN KEY ("body_type") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the rental item */,
  "fit" TEXT /* Fit of the rental item (e.g., fit, snug, loose) */,
  "rented_for" TEXT /* Occasion for which the item is typically rented (e.g., wedding, party) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the rental item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the rental item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the rental item */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the rental item */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of available items */,
  "price_per_day" TEXT /* Rental price per day */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of times the item has been rented */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_rented_for FOREIGN KEY ("rented_for") REFERENCES rental_occasions ("occasion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_fit FOREIGN KEY ("fit") REFERENCES fits ("fit_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., romper, gown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental item */,
  "rented_for" TEXT /* Occasion for which the item was rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the item was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "total_days_rented" INTEGER /* Number of days the item was rented */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total rental cost */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., pending, active, returned, late) */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee incurred */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rental record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rental record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_rented_for FOREIGN KEY ("rented_for") REFERENCES rental_occasions ("occasion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the review */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "correct_fit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item fit correctly */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the fit of the item (1-5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the quality of the item (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money (1-5) */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images uploaded by the user */,
  "video_urls" TEXT /* URLs of videos uploaded by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type (e.g., hourglass, athletic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 14, 12) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit type */,
  "fit_name" TEXT /* Name of the fit type (e.g., fit, snug, loose) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_occasions" (
  "occasion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occasion */,
  "occasion_name" TEXT /* Name of the occasion (e.g., wedding, party) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occasion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occasion_id")
)
